explanation: The code prompts the user to enter a set of numbers, checking if any of the numbers entered are duplicates. It uses an array to track the occurrence of numbers in a range from 1 to 10 (as defined by N = 5). If a duplicate is found, it prints the number. Additionally, the program checks for multiples of each unique number entered (starting from 2) and prints these multiples if they exist in the input set.
subject: Session 3 Exercise 2 Draft
summary: This program detects duplicate numbers from user input within a specified range and identifies multiples of those numbers.
